[Simpo Sign A-Frame](https://www.banners.com/banner-stands/simpo-sign) 5. Simpo Sign A-Frame Kit # Simpo Sign A-Frame Sidewalk Sign Kit: With 27" x 22" Signs The Simpo Sign A-Frame Kit includes the hardware and (2) 27" X 22" full-color signs. It's perfect for outdoor advertisements and the frame is lightweight and tough. The A-frame has molded handles so it can easily be transported. If you would like to have double sided printed signs, please contact a customer service representative. ![Simpo Sign A Frame with (2) 27x22 Signs](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2pcache/a8a9fc06-e003-47c7-aeb2-773e0d27c69e) Material Choice: 4 mm Coroplast Sign (2) Product: with Simpo Sign Hardware Quantity: (Min: 1, Max: 1000) Size (H x W): 27" x 22" 27" x 22" ![Loading product options](/includes/Images/loadingBar.gif) Loading product options...
